---
title: "project_fishtest.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/integration/project_fishtest.py"
loc: 12
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.92
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.07
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating GungnirSPRT, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [math](file://math)

### Exports
- `GungnirSPRT`
- `__init__`
- `evaluate_delta`
